name: Ahrefs
blocker: Production access for new integrations is gated behind an approval process and an Ahrefs Enterprise plan.
api_notes: The API provides extensive access to backlink, keyword, and site audit data via REST endpoints. Access is credit-based and governed by a unit-billing model.

evidence.claim: Ahrefs provides a REST API for accessing marketing and search data.
Ahrefs Connect uses OAuth 2.0 for integrations and requires an Enterprise plan for production activation.
Production API usage is restricted, requiring Enterprise subscriptions and credit-based billing.
Search citation: Ahrefs—AI Marketing Platform Powered by Big Data

access_notes: While free test queries are available for development, production access generally requires an Ahrefs Enterprise plan or, in some cases for legacy users, a paid subscription. Third-party app integrations through Ahrefs Connect require approval and typically an Enterprise plan.
mcp_notes: Ahrefs documentation mentions an 'MCP' section for connecting data to AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT), but this is presented as a consumer-facing feature for AI integration rather than a public developer API server for third-party platforms to build upon.
auth_notes: Direct API usage utilizes API keys (sent as Bearer tokens). Third-party integrations via Ahrefs Connect use OAuth 2.0.
one_liner: Ahrefs is a SaaS SEO and marketing platform providing data for backlink analysis, keyword research, site audits, and rank tracking.
